description: Define a unified workflow fixed-value editor contract that subsumes today’s picker metadata and supports both inline and dialog editing surfaces.
Add a normalization layer that maps legacy picker metadata into the unified editor contract for designer use.
Expose the unified editor configuration on workflow action input fields so downstream rendering uses one model.
Refactor the fixed-value renderer to use a single editor shell that can host inline-only, dialog-only, or inline-plus-dialog editor surfaces.
Support a prompt text editor that offers both inline multiline editing and a larger dialog-based editing experience from the same field metadata.
Preserve existing ticket/client-style picker behavior by routing those fields through the unified editor system via a compatibility adapter.
Add a migration path so prompt can adopt the new contract first while picker-backed fields migrate incrementally.
